strengths: Exceeds 6+ year requirement with 13+ years full-stack experience; currently Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq with explicit full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work
Deep backend expertise across distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance infrastructure (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec, AWS CDK at Optilyz)
Active in AI agent infrastructure and MCP development in current role; demonstrates engagement with emerging technologies
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement; Node.js experience is clear but framework-specific proficiency unconfirmed
React experience limited to single role (Optilyz) with no mention of testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) required for frontend quality standards
Security and authentication practices not explicitly addressed in resume; GCP/Azure cloud platforms not mentioned alongside AWS
response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ year experience baseline with 13+ years in full-stack development and clear mastery of primary stack languages (TypeScript, Node.js). Current role demonstrates full-stack contribution and AI infrastructure work, aligning with role requirements. Solid backend credentials including distributed systems, microservices, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). However, Nest.js—listed as primary framework—is not explicitly mentioned, and React/frontend testing expertise lacks depth. Security best practices and specific testing framework proficiency (Vitest, Playwright) are not evidenced in resume. These gaps are addressable through interview verification but represent knowledge verification points.
